Title: Verify creating token with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1.Set POST method and add endpoint "auth" to URL
2. Add header Content-Type: application/json
3. Enter valid username and password in the Body
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains a unique security token

Title: Verify creating token with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1.Set POST method and add endpoint "auth" to URL
2. Add valid header
3. Enter invalid username or password in the Body
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains "Bad credentials"

Title: Verify creating token with invalid Content-Type
Test Steps:
1.Set POST method and add endpoint "auth" to URL
2. Add invalid header
3. Enter invalid username or password in the Body
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains "Bad credentials"

Title: Verify creating token with missing username field
Test Steps:
1.Set POST method and add endpoint "auth" to URL
2. Add valid header
3. Enter password field only and remove username field from Body
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains "Bad credentials"

Title: Verify creating token with missing password field
Test Steps:
1.Set POST method and add endpoint "auth" to URL
2. Add valid header
3. Enter username field only and remove password field from Body
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains "Bad credentials"

Title: Verify creating token with leaving username and password fields empty
Test Steps:
1.Set POST method and add endpoint "auth" to URL
2. Add valid header
3. Leave first name and password fields empty
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains "Bad credentials"

Title: Verify retrieve booking IDS successfully
Test Steps:
1.Set GET method and add endpoint booking to URL
2.Click Send
Expected Result: Response body contains Array of objects that contain unique booking IDs

Title: Verify creating a new booking with valid data
Test Steps:

2.Add valid Headers "Content-Type and Accept
3.Enter valid payload in Body
4.Click Send
Test Data:
Headers:
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

Body: valid credentials

Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

Title: Verify creating a new booking with missing mandatory fields (e.g., empty firstname)

2.Add valid Headers "Content-Type and Accept
3. Remove mandatory field like firstname from Body
4. Click Send
Test Data:
Headers:
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

Body: Empty firstname
Expected Result: Creation a new booking is failed and response body contains 400 Bad Request

Title: Verify creating a new booking with invalid data type (e.g., total price as string "abc")
Test Steps:

2.Add valid Headers "Content-Type and Accept
3. Enter a text string inside total price instead of a number
4. Click Send
Test Data:
Headers:
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

Body: price: hgs
Expected Result: Creation a new booking is failed and response body contains 400 Bad Request

4. Click Send
Test Data:
Headers:
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

Body: date: 01-01-20

Title: Verify creating a new booking where checkout date is before check in date
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to POST and add booking to URL
2.Add valid Headers "Content-Type and Accept
3. Enter checkout date to be earlier than check in date in Body
4. Click Send
Test Data:
Headers:
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

Body: 
checkin: 15-07-2026 
checkout:10-07-2026
Expected Result: Creation a new booking is failed and response body contains 400 Bad Request

4. Click Send

Headers:

Body:

Expected Result: Creation a new booking is failed and response body contains 400 Bad Request

Title: Verify retrieve booking details using the generated booking id
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to GET and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Enter a known existing booking ID in the URL path
3. Click Send
Expected Result: Returns correct details matching the created booking

Title: Verify retrieve a booking using a non-existing ID
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to GET and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Enter a non-existing numeric ID (e.g., 9999999) in URL path
3. Click Send
Expected Result: Returns Not Found error

Title: Try to retrieve a booking using an invalid ID format
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to GET and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Enter text characters instead of numbers as the ID in URL path (e.g., /booking/abc)
3. Click Send
Expected Result: Returns Bad Request or Not Found

Title: Verify update full booking details
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to PUT and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Add valid Cookie: token={{Tokenautomated}} in headers
3. Enter updated JSON body with new payload data
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Booking updated successfully, returns updated JSON

Title: Verify update full booking without providing Auth Token
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to PUT and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Add an invalid token value in the Cookie header
3. Enter updated JSON body
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Returns "Forbidden" or "Unauthorized"

Title: Verify update booking with an expired or invalid Token
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to PUT and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Add an expired token value in the Cookie header
3. Enter updated JSON body
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Returns Forbidden due to invalid session

Title: Verify partial update (PATCH) to modify only the first name
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to PATCH and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Remove the Cookie/Token header completely
3. Enter a new firstname
4. Click Send
Expected Result: Returns updated JSON with new first name only

Title: Verify delete the created booking using dynamic booking id
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to DELETE and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Add valid Cookie: token={{Tokenautomated}} header
3. Click Send
Expected Result: Booking deleted successfully

Title: Verify booking is completely removed after deletion
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to GET and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Pass the exact same deleted booking ID in URL path
3. Click Send
Expected Result: Returns "Not Found" error

Title: Verify delete a booking that is already deleted (Double Delete)
Test Steps:
1. Set request method to DELETE and add booking/{id} to URL
2. Enter The deleted booking ID and valid Cookie header again
3. Click Send
Expected Result: Returns Not Found or Method Not Allowed
